description_long: This nightstand features a light wood finish with a smooth, rectangular tabletop and elegantly curved legs that taper toward the floor, giving it a refined and modern appearance. The legs are slender and splayed, adding a touch of sophistication and stability to the overall design. On top of the nightstand sits a decorative gray conch shell, which serves as an ornamental accent. The nightstand does not display any visible drawers, handles, or hardware, emphasizing a minimalist aesthetic. The wood grain is subtly visible, contributing to its natural and warm look. The overall construction appears sturdy, suitable for supporting small objects or decor in an urban environment.
description: A light wood nightstand with curved, tapered legs and a minimalist, drawerless design, topped with a decorative gray conch shell.
description_view_0: Front view showing the curved legs and the conch shell angled to the left.
description_view_1: Side view with the conch shell pointing directly forward, highlighting the nightstand's depth.
description_view_2: Rear view with the conch shell angled to the right, showing the back curvature of the legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the conch shell's tip facing directly backward, emphasizing the tabletop's width.
attribute_placement_relative_to_other_ur: beside a bed or against a wall
